inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Employee's body weight for accurate energy expenditure estimation during workplace wellness Zumba sessions.

inputs.label: Session Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the Zumba session, typically 45–90 minutes for corporate fitness programs.

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task for Zumba; typical range 6–8 depending on intensity, used to calculate calorie burn.

inputs.label: Individual Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Correction factor for individual metabolic variations, e.g., 1.05 for high metabolism, 0.95 for low.
